name: Quick Turkey and Spinach Tetrazzini
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Spaghetti, broken into 3 or 4 inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 500°F.
2. Cook spaghetti pieces until tender but still firm to the bite. Drain, reserving 1/4 cup of cooking liquid.
3. Mix spaghetti, turkey, creamed spinach, ricotta, tomatoes, Parmesan, garlic, and reserved cooking liquid in a large bowl. Season with pepper.
4. Spread mixture in a 9-inch diameter deep dish pie plate.
5. Sprinkle remaining 1 tbsp cheese on top.
6. Bake until heated through and topping is golden brown, about 10 minutes.
